summary: In this week’s snapshot for Metro Vancouver, RSV looks high (falling), flu high (rising), and COVID low (falling)—neighbourhood context, not a test result for your child. Air: comfortable for most kids (lower risk on the AQHI scale). Weather: Clear · 14°C. For most families we’d call it “Nice for a walk outside” outside today.
